market_assessment: bearish: BCH crash -13.2% confirmed whale liquidation from $415 to $348 low. Bounce to $359 (+3.2%) = short-covering bounce. All majors weak (BTC -1.2%, ETH -2.2%, DOGE -5.9%). Bounce phase dangerous for both longs AND shorts. Strategy: go to cash, wait for bounce exhaustion before re-entering shorts.

risk_control.urgent_advice: BCH崩盘余震中。反弹阶段双杀风险极高。所有实盘仓位强制平仓。虚拟盘关闭亏损仓位。配置版version升级到7。等待BTC跌破$76K或BCH回踩$350后再开空。

contract.reason: BCH崩盘目标清晰，但反弹未结束。等待BCH反弹至$365-$370区域无法突破后，再实盘部署空单。现价$359不宜追空。
